babyDevelopment: The baby can now make facial expressions like squinting and frowning. The thyroid gland is starting to produce hormones. Lanugo is covering the body, providing warmth until enough body fat develops.
bodyChanges: You may feel more like yourself again as nausea subsides. Your 'bump' might be more noticeable now. Some women experience 'pregnancy brain' or forgetfulness due to hormonal and lifestyle changes.
tips: Incorporate more fiber if you're experiencing constipation
Take photos of your growing bump for memories
Stay consistent with your prenatal vitamins

do: Moisturize to help with skin elasticity
dont: Stop exercising unless advised by a doctor

travelAdvisory.note: An ideal time for a comfortable vacation.

warningSignsToWatch: Severe back pain that doesn't go away
milestoneDescription: The baby's facial muscles are getting a workout as expressions form.
